title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
Warsh testifies House 14 Jul (10am ET) + Senate 15 Jul — debut semiannual: Sept rate-hike path in focus.
CPI (June) due 14 Jul 8:30am ET — PPI Jul 15, Retail Sales Jul 16; heaviest macro week of summer.
All prices sub-threshold: BTC $63,950 −0.38% · ETH $1,804 +0.25% · S&P 7,575 +0.42% · DXY 101.0 flat.
